description: NIST CFReDS Hacking Case (Greg Schardt / 'Mr. Evil'), scored against the SAME 10 sampled NIST ground-truth findings that Agentic-DART benchmarks itself on (its case-08). Used for the apples-to-apples recall comparison; see scripts/measure_cfreds.py and docs/DART-COMPARISON.md.
comparison_methodology: Probe each finding against real cold-box primitives (registry_query.system_profile / sam_accounts on hives extracted from the raw split image, prefetch enumeration). Mirrors DART's scripts/measure_cfreds.py.

results.key_difference: cold-box scores from the raw disk image it ingested itself; DART consumes curated/synthetic evidence and cannot ingest raw E01/dd images.

findings.coldbox: strict (9 via prefetch: Cain, Ethereal, NetStumbler, Look@LAN, 123WASP)
strict (pcap magic on extracted capture file)
strict (IE Content.IE5 index.dat yahoo identity URL)
